metaData.Supplier Name: TAN SENG KEE FOODS PTE LTD

product.name: Kang Kang Pasteurised Fresh Kway Teow

metaData.Preparation:
• Udon Soup:
1. Add Udon noodles and preferred seasoning to 250ml of boiling water
2. Cook for 2 minutes, ready to serve
*Add your choice of meat and vegetables for better tasting noodles
• Fried Udon:
1. Stir fry your choice of meat and vegetables in oil
2. Add a bit of salt and pepper
3. Add in the Udon noodles and stir fry on low heat for about 2 minutes
4. Lastly, add soy sauce and oyster sauce to taste, ready to serve
metaData.Storage Information:
• Store in a cool, dry place
• Avoid direct sunlight

metaData.Ingredients: Wheat Flour, Salt, Sodium Carbonate, Soya Bean Oil, Permitted Food Colouring (E102)
Wheat Flour, Salt, Sodium Carbonate, Soya Bean Oil, Permitted Food Colouring (E102)
metaData.Key Information: Fortune Hokkien Noodles has a spring texture and is ideal for prawn mee soup, mee goreng, fishball mee soup, and stir-fried hokkien mee.
metaData.Preparation:
1. Tear open film
2. Prepare using preferred method

metaData.Ingredients: Rice Flour, Starch, Salt, Vegetable Oil
metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
1. Immerse packet of unicurd rice vermicelli in hot water for 5 minutes, loosen rice vermicelli with chopsticks and drain
2. Prepare stock. Boil your favourite ingredients and vegetables
3. Add in unicurd rice vermicelli, bring to boil, serve hot

offers.description: Buy 1 Unicurd Fresh Noodle - Rice Vermicelli @ $1.50
